Laboratory Biosafety Guidelines for working with SARS-CoV-2 
Sept. 5, 2025 
EspaÃ±ol 
What to know 
This guidance is intended for clinical laboratory and support staff who handle or process specimens associated with COVID-19. 
In December 2024, the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) issued guidelines specifically for SARS-CoV-2. This revised guidance is specific to SARS-CoV-2 and should not be extrapolated to other members of th
